title: The EU investigations on cold-rolled stainless flat steel have been concluded.
bodyHtml:
The investigations conducted by the European Union (EU) regarding the potential circumvention of the anti-dumping and countervailing duties applied to imports of cold-rolled stainless flat steel originating from Indonesia, under the customs tariff positions (7219.31.00, 7219.32.10, 7219.32.90, 7219.33.10, 7219.33.90, 7219.34.10, 7219.34.90, 7219.35.10, 7219.35.90, 7219.90.20, 7219.90.80, 7220.20.21, 7220.20.29, 7220.20.41, 7220.20.49, 7220.20.81, 7220.20.89, 7220.90.20, 7220.90.80), have been completed by the Directorate-General for Trade of the European Commission (Commission).

For cold-rolled stainless flat steel products originating from Indonesia:

The anti-dumping duty rate of 19.3% will also apply to products originating from and exported by Taiwan and Vietnam. No measures will be applied to products exported from Turkey.

The countervailing duty rate of 20.5% will apply to products originating from and exported by Taiwan, Vietnam, and Turkey (regardless of origin).

Relevant EU TARIC codes: [7219310010, 7219310020, 7219321010, 7219321020, 7219329010, 7219329020, 7219331010, 7219331020, 7219339010, 7219339020, 7219341010, 7219341020, 7219349010, 7219349020, 7219351010, 7219351020, 7219359010, 7219359020, 7219902010, 7219902020, 7219908010, 7219908020, 7220202110, 7220202120, 7220202910, 7220202920, 7220204110, 7220204120, 7220204910, 7220204920, 7220208110, 7220208120, 7220208910, 7220208920, 7220902010, 7220902020, 7220908010 and 7220908020.]

The application of the measures within the scope of these duties will be suspended as long as the EU's steel safeguard measures, applied in case of quota overrun, remain in effect.

Click here for the countervailing duty investigation.
